strategy_summary: The mandibles of many herbivorous insects have exceptional cutting abilities due to the presence of zinc or managese salts. “Many invertebrates use crystals of metal salts to harden their cutting, rasping, and grinding equipment … The mandibles of herbivorous insects contain zinc or manganese salts (Vincent 1990).”…
mechanism:
The mandibles of many herbivorous insects have exceptional cutting abilities due to the presence of zinc or managese salts.

“Many invertebrates use crystals of metal salts to harden their cutting, rasping, and grinding equipment … The mandibles of herbivorous insects contain zinc or manganese salts (Vincent 1990).” (Vogel 2003:333)
